sql:
SELECT
        	CASE 
	        	WHEN tpd.SELF_PROCESS_TYPE = 'S' THEN tpd.ALARMNO
	            ELSE tpd.TICKET_ID
	            END AS TICKET_ID
        	, TO_CHAR(OCCUR_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS OCCUR_TIME
        	, TO_CHAR(CLOS_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CLOS_TIME
        	, CASE WHEN tpd.TICKET_TYPE IS NULL THEN 'SYSLOG'
	        	ELSE tpd.TICKET_TYPE
	        	END AS TICKET_TYPE
        	, SELF_PROCESS_TYPE 
        	, CASE 
	        	WHEN tpd.SELF_PROCESS_TYPE = 'S' THEN tss.FAULT_DETAIL_CONTENT
	            ELSE ts.FAULT_DETAIL_CONTENT
	            END AS FAULT_DETAIL_CONTENT
	        , CLOS_TYPE 
	        , CLOS_STATUS 
            , TO_CHAR((
                SELECT FAULT_TIME
                FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_current rtc
                WHERE rtc.ticket_id = tpd.ticket_id
            ), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS FAULT_TIME
            , TS.TICKET_RESULT
            , (
                SELECT  ZERO1_ENTROPY
                FROM rca.tb_rca_ticket_current rtc
                WHERE tpd.ticket_id = rtc.ticket_id
            ) ZERO1_ENTROPY
       	FROM nia.tb_auto_treat_process_dtl tpd
       	LEFT JOIN nia.tb_sop ts ON tpd.ticket_id = ts.ticket_id 
       	LEFT JOIN nia.tb_syslog_sop tss ON tpd.alarmno = tss.alarmno
       	WHERE 1=1
                    AND DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', tpd.OCCUR_TIME) = TO_TIMESTAMP(CONCAT('2024-08', '-01'), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
                    AND tpd.SELF_PROCESS_GROUP = 'ST'
       	ORDER BY TPD.OCCUR_TIME DESC
            LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0
